Class MBot2JsonCodec

java.lang.Object
edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.MBot2JsonCodec
All Implemented Interfaces:
JsonCodec
public class MBot2JsonCodec extends Object implements JsonCodec
An implementation of JsonCodec specifically for the MBot2 robot's JSON protocol. This class handles the encoding of commands to JSON strings and decoding of JSON responses from the MBot2 robot.

  • Constructor Summary

    decodeResponse(String json)
    Decodes a JSON response string from the MBot2 robot into a JsonResponse object.

  • Constructor Details

    • MBot2JsonCodec

      public MBot2JsonCodec()

  • Method Details

    • encodeCommand

      public String encodeCommand(String command, Map<String,Object> parameters)
      Encodes a command and its parameters into a JSON string suitable for the MBot2 robot. The command will be structured with a "COMMAND" type, a unique ID, and the given command and parameters within the "payload".
      Specified by:
      encodeCommand in interface JsonCodec
      Parameters:
      command - The name of the command to be sent (e.g., "MOVE_TIME", "LED").
      parameters - A map of string keys to object values representing the command's parameters. Can be null if the command has no parameters.
      Returns:
      A JSON string representing the encoded command.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if there is an error during JSON processing.

    • decodeResponse

      public JsonResponse decodeResponse(String json)
      Decodes a JSON response string from the MBot2 robot into a JsonResponse object.
      Specified by:
      decodeResponse in interface JsonCodec
      Parameters:
      json - The JSON string received from the robot.
      Returns:
      A JsonResponse object containing the parsed response.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the JSON string is invalid or cannot be processed.
